vendors.name: Twin Brothers
vendors.tagline: The legend of Arawak Cay since 1994
vendors.description: Twin Brothers is the cornerstone of the Fish Fry experience. Known for their perfectly fried snapper and conch salad made fresh to order, this is the shack that started it all.

menu.name: Cracked Conch
menu.description: Hand-pounded conch, lightly breaded and fried golden. Served with peas and rice and coleslaw.

menu.name: Fried Snapper
menu.description: Whole red snapper, seasoned with Bahamian spices and fried to order.

menu.name: Conch Salad
menu.description: Fresh conch, diced tomatoes, onions, peppers, and citrus. Made to order.

menu.name: Peas and Rice
menu.description: Traditional Bahamian peas and rice cooked with thyme and coconut milk.

menu.name: Kalik Beer
menu.description: The beer of the Bahamas. Ice cold.

vendors.name: Goldie's
vendors.description: Goldie's has been feeding Nassau for decades. No frills, no pretense — just the best conch fritters on the strip and portions that mean you will not need to eat again until tomorrow.

menu.name: Conch Fritters
menu.description: Six golden fritters packed with fresh conch and island spices. Served with dipping sauce.

menu.name: Steamed Fish
menu.description: Whole fish steamed in a rich tomato and pepper sauce. Served with grits.

menu.name: Sky Juice
menu.description: Fresh coconut water, gin, and sweet milk. The official drink of the Fish Fry.

vendors.name: Cap's Fish Fry
vendors.description: Cap's is known for generous portions and a welcoming atmosphere. Their steamed conch is slow-cooked and draws a crowd every Friday night.

menu.name: Steamed Conch
menu.description: Conch slow-steamed in a seasoned broth with peppers and onions.

menu.name: Chicken Souse
menu.description: Traditional Bahamian souse with chicken, lime, and allspice.

menu.name: Johnny Cake
menu.description: Dense, slightly sweet Bahamian cornbread baked fresh daily.

menu.name: Switcha
menu.description: Fresh-squeezed Bahamian lemonade made with sour oranges.

vendors.name: Afar Bahamian Cuisine
vendors.description: Afar brings a contemporary lens to traditional Bahamian cooking. Expect familiar flavors elevated with technique and presentation that feels upscale without losing the soul of the Fish Fry.

menu.name: Grilled Lobster Tail
menu.description: Bahamian spiny lobster tail, grilled with garlic butter and herbs.

menu.name: Conch Chowder
menu.description: Rich, creamy chowder with fresh conch, potatoes, and thyme.

menu.name: Mango Daiquiri
menu.description: Fresh Bahamian mango blended with rum and lime.

fishFryInfo.name: Arawak Cay Fish Fry
fishFryInfo.tagline: The soul of Nassau on a plate
fishFryInfo.description: Arawak Cay, known locally as The Fish Fry, is Nassau's most beloved culinary destination. Stretching along the western waterfront, this collection of colorful wooden shacks has been serving fresh Bahamian seafood since the 1980s.
